commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `waitForAgentJob` so the outer fallback timer returns a pending timeout snapshot when no pending error exists, and adds a fake-timer regression test for that race.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +37. Total +42 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source: current main can create a pending timeout snapshot, then the outer `waitForAgentJob` timer resolves `null` because it checks only pending errors. I did not run tests in this read-only checkout.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide whether to land this as a partial wait-layer fix without closing the linked issue, or require the remaining delivery fix first.

target.title: fix: forward pending timeout snapshot in waitForAgentJob fallback timer
target.body:
## Summary

- When a sub-agent run is force-killed by its run timeout, `waitForAgentJob`'s outer timer callback only consulted `getPendingAgentRunError` and ignored `getPendingAgentRunTimeout`. If a pending timeout was registered (but no pending error), the timer called `finish(null)`, discarding the timeout snapshot.
- This prevented the parent session from receiving the timeout completion event. The sub-agent registry correctly recorded `status: "timeout"` with `endedAt`, but the parent never got notified.
- The fix makes the wait-timer fallback symmetric: it checks `getPendingAgentRunTimeout` when there is no pending error, carrying the timeout snapshot so downstream code sees `endedAt` and triggers `isTerminalWaitTimeout`.

## Verification

- Added test "surfaces pending timeout diagnostics when outer timeout fires before timeout grace period" covering the exact race: a lifecycle end event with `aborted: true` followed by the outer timer firing before the retry grace period.
- All 14 existing `waitForAgentJob` tests continue to pass.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** The waitForAgentJob outer timer now falls back to the pending timeout snapshot when no pending error is registered, so timed-out sub-agent runs notify the parent session.

**Environment tested:** Node 22.x on Linux, pnpm test.

**Steps run after the patch:** Ran the full `waitForAgentJob` test suite including the new pending timeout test.

**Evidence after fix:**

```
$ pnpm test src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts -- -t waitForAgentJob

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  14 passed | 104 skipped (118)
   Duration  19.72s
```

**Observed result:** All 14 tests pass (13 existing + 1 new). The new test verifies that when a timeout lifecycle event fires and the outer timer expires before the retry grace period, the timeout snapshot (with status, startedAt, endedAt, and timeoutPhase) is returned instead of null.

**Not tested:** Live sub-agent spawn with real gateway timeout. The fix is unit-tested against the waitForAgentJob promise lifecycle with fake timers.
